propositions: Author a project-authored Autosubmit label (-1..+1, function=NoBlock, empty copyCondition, three value lines) in project.config, distinct from Gerrit's first-party autosubmit submit-plugin.
Grant label-Autosubmit vote ACL via two lines to Contributors (requesters) and Administrators (manual fallback), mirroring the LLM-Review/Verified pattern.
The label is non-gating and referenced by no submit requirement; the bot re-verifies the two-vote gate on the tested SHA at submit when is:submittable holds.
Capture a pre-cutover access baseline snapshot and commit it in the same change that adds the label, so ADR-0042's access-diff has a committed baseline.
Apply and verify the live refs/meta/config cutover, confirming a clean post-cutover access diff showing only the added label-Autosubmit grants.
Add an inline header comment security-invariant artifact in the Autosubmit label block and update setup-project.sh's push commit message to name the label+ACL addition for audit trail.
